channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.3.1

Improvements & Fixes

  • Improved Journal responsiveness and scrolling behavior.
  • Refined interaction details and visual polish across the experience.
  • Fixed layout and stability issues for smoother everyday use.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
